backend.title: Backend Core
backend.description: Over 19 years of experience in Java. Specialist in Spring Boot and Quarkus. Architecture of scalable enterprise systems and microservices. Development of modular, testable backend systems with NestJS.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: Modern SPAs with Angular and TypeScript. Focus on performance, state management, and intuitive UX.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure & Hosting
infrastructure.description: Setup and management of vServer environments (Strato). Deployment of web projects via Docker and Nginx.

aiAutomation.title: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.description: Integration of LLMs into software workflows. Development of AI-powered tools and process automation. Real-time communication and event-driven architectures.

data.title: Data
data.description: Design and optimization of relational and NoSQL databases. Focus on data integrity and performance tuning.

devops.title: DevOps
devops.description: Automation of deployment processes and container orchestration for scalable cloud infrastructures.

workflow.title: Workflow & Tools
workflow.description: Proficient use of modern development environments and agile methodologies. Expert knowledge in modeling and transforming complex data formats.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Design of maintainable systems through Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and hexagonal architectures.
